mapper.insert: insert into expenses ( id, entry_date, amount, category_id, memo, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{id}, #{entryDate}, #{amount}, #{categoryId}, #{memo}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
mapper.select: select e.id, e.entry_date, e.amount, c.name as category_name, e.memo from expenses e inner join categories c on e.category_id = c.id where e.entry_date >= #{startDate} and e.entry_date < #{endDate} order by e.entry_date, e.created_at
